blended.narrative: Ski Granby Ranch is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,590 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 9" over the past week. Current depth: 21".
